---
pagetitle: "Events | ASM-TMC Chapter"
toc: false
---

## Calendar

```{=html}
<!-- FullCalendar CDN -->
<link  href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/fullcalendar@6.1.11/index.global.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/fullcalendar@6.1.11/index.global.min.js"></script>

<div class="fc-legend mb-2">
  <span class="fc-legend-dot" style="background:#003087;"></span> Symposium &nbsp;
  <span class="fc-legend-dot" style="background:#0054a6;"></span> Seminar &nbsp;
  <span class="fc-legend-dot" style="background:#e8740c;"></span> Networking &nbsp;
  <span class="fc-legend-dot" style="background:#2e7d32;"></span> Workshop
</div>

<div id="event-calendar" style="max-width:900px; margin:0 auto;"></div>

<!-- Upcoming Events listing rendered from the same data source -->
<div id="upcoming-events-list" style="margin-top:2rem;"></div>

<script src="asm-events.js"></script>
<script>
/* ── Render FullCalendar ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  const ASM_EVENTS = Array.isArray(window.ASM_EVENTS) ? window.ASM_EVENTS : [];
  const escapeHtml = (value) => String(value ?? '')
    .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
    .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
    .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
    .replace(/"/g, '&quot;')
    .replace(/'/g, '&#39;');
  const calEl    = document.getElementById('event-calendar');
  if (window.FullCalendar && calEl) {
    const calendar = new FullCalendar.Calendar(calEl, {
      initialView: 'dayGridMonth',
      headerToolbar: {
        left:   'prev,next today',
        center: 'title',
        right:  'dayGridMonth,listYear'
      },
      height: 'auto',
      events: ASM_EVENTS,
      eventClick: (info) => {
        const p   = info.event.extendedProps;
        const msg = info.event.title
                + (p.location    ? '\n📍 ' + p.location    : '')
                + (p.description ? '\n📝 ' + p.description : '');
        alert(msg);
      },
      eventMouseEnter: (info) => {
        info.el.title = info.event.extendedProps.description || '';
      }
    });
    calendar.render();
  }

  /* ── Render Upcoming Events list from the same data ─────────────────── */
  const upcoming = ASM_EVENTS
    .filter((event) => event.isUpcoming)
    .sort((a, b) => new Date(a.start) - new Date(b.start));

  const container = document.getElementById('upcoming-events-list');
  if (upcoming.length === 0) {
    container.innerHTML = '<p class="text-muted">No upcoming events scheduled at this time. Check back soon!</p>';
    return;
  }

  let html = '<h2>Upcoming Events</h2>';
  upcoming.forEach(ev => {
    const p       = ev.extendedProps;
    const date    = new Date(ev.start + 'T00:00:00');
    const dateStr = date.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { weekday: 'long', year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' });
    const icsBtn  = ev.icsFile
      ? '<a href="' + escapeHtml(ev.icsFile) + '" download class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary ics-btn mt-2">'
        + '<i class="bi bi-calendar-plus"></i> Add to Calendar (.ics)</a>'
      : '';
    html += '<div class="callout callout-style-default callout-note" style="margin-bottom:1rem;">'
          + '<div class="callout-header"><strong>' + escapeHtml(ev.title) + '</strong></div>'
          + '<div class="callout-body">'
          + '<p>🗓 <strong>Date:</strong> ' + dateStr + '<br>'
          + '📍 <strong>Location:</strong> ' + escapeHtml(p.location || 'TBD') + '<br>'
          + '📝 <strong>Description:</strong> ' + escapeHtml(p.description || '') + '</p>'
          + icsBtn
          + '</div></div>';
  });
  container.innerHTML = html;
});
</script>
```

---

## Propose an Event

Members are encouraged to propose seminars, workshops, or social events. If you would like to present your research, suggest a speaker, or propose an event format, reach out to our Events Coordinator via the [About page](../about/index.qmd).

::: {.callout-tip}
## Stay Informed
Sign up for our mailing list to receive announcements for all upcoming ASM-TMC events. Send an email with the subject **"Subscribe"** to [asm.tmc.chapter@gmail.com](mailto:asm.tmc.chapter@gmail.com).
:::
